executives.name: Jakki Haussler
executives.background: Jakki Haussler is the Chairman and co-founder of Opus Capital Management. She has extensive experience in financial services and investment management.

executives.name: Sandra Peterson
executives.background: Operating Partner at Clayton, Dubilier & Rice. Former Group Worldwide Chairman of Johnson & Johnson.
